name: Air B School Bus Trnsprtn Inc
districts_or_customers: Miami-Dade County Public Schools (certified vendor, public routes and field trips); Broward County area
recent_news: Listed on the 2025 Miami-Dade County Public Schools approved private bus companies roster, indicating active district contracting.
fit_notes: Small independent Miami-Dade contractor (~52 power units / 60 drivers per FMCSA, ~70 buses per company materials) with long M-DCPS relationship. Reasonable Florida tuck-in for Summit; size is sub-scale but a useful add-on in a fragmented Miami market. Confirm Beltran-family succession appetite.

name: H & W Transportation Inc
districts_or_customers: Lakeview School District (Stoneboro/Sandy Lake area, Mercer County PA)
recent_news: No recent M&A or news; FMCSA authority active since ~2008 as small carrier/broker; continues to serve Lakeview SD per district transportation page.
fit_notes: Very small rural western-PA single-district contractor (Lakeview SD). Independent owner-operator — possible cheap tuck-in to densify any NW PA route cluster, but standalone scale is minimal and likely below Summit's threshold absent geographic synergy.

name: CTC
districts_or_customers: East Baton Rouge area; CATS (Capital Area Transit System) 'CATS on Demand' paratransit contractor; daily transportation of students with special needs; nursing homes and psychiatric day programs (500+ transfers/day)
recent_news: Continues as CATS On Demand contractor for paratransit; brand 'Reliant On Call' also active in Baton Rouge as NEMT operator.
fit_notes: Listing 'CTC' tied to Reliant Transportation Group / Reliant On Call — predominantly NEMT and CATS paratransit, with some SPED student work. Not a yellow-bus operator; closer to a NEMT/paratransit business with student-special-needs as an adjunct. Marginal fit for Summit unless platform is targeting SPED/NEMT adjacencies.

name: Wheelchair Accessible Vans Inc
districts_or_customers: East Texas (Tyler & Longview), Houston, Austin, Dallas/Carrollton, Fort Worth; ADA event contracts including Super Bowl, NFL Draft, Formula 1, Austin City Limits; veterans and dependents
recent_news: No M&A; continues operating as Wheelchair Accessible Transportation, LLC (dba 'Wheelin' It' / WeRollYou); family-owned staffed by service-disabled veterans.
fit_notes: Not a school-bus operator — wheelchair-van rental and ADA event shuttle business. Outside Summit's core student-transport thesis; would only be relevant if Summit pursues NEMT/event accessibility adjacencies. De-prioritize as a school-bus tuck-in.

name: Ambassador Wheelchair Svc
principals: Roy Fazzina and Salvatore Marotta (co-owners); Anthony Fazzina
districts_or_customers: Hartford and Central Connecticut; non-emergency medical clients; some individual school transport for wheelchair-bound students (per customer reviews); not identified as a contracted school-district vendor
recent_news: Co-owner Sal Marotta submitted testimony to CT General Assembly in 2024 (HB-05427) supporting NEMT-related legislation; no M&A reported.
fit_notes: Founded 1991, Rocky Hill CT family-owned NEMT/wheelchair-van operator — not a yellow-bus contractor. Outside Summit's school-bus tuck-in thesis; potential adjacency only if Summit expands into SPED/NEMT in CT. De-prioritize.
